title: astragalus hartwegii
intro: Astragalus hartwegii, also known as the Sierra milkvetch or Hartweg's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hartwegii are believed to include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and reduced stress and fatigue levels. Astragalus hartwegii is typically prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or teas, although it can also be found in combination with other herbs in various traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
